overview: Based on the published agenda, the Village of Kronenwetter Plan Commission was scheduled to hold a revised meeting to conduct public hearings and consider zoning and development requests, including a zoning change for Marathon County Highway Department property and a conditional use permit for a residential pond.

agenda.item: Zoning Change Request - Marathon County Highway Department to rezone 25.24 acres from B3, SF and AR to M2 General Industrial at multiple Old Hwy 51 addresses
Conditional Use Permit - Zach & Abbigal Knetter for pond on north side of property on Kronenwetter Drive
Rezone Marathon County Highway Facility - Discussion and possible action
CSM Marathon County Highway Facility - Discussion and possible action
Conditional Use Pond - Zach and Abbigal Knetter - Discussion and possible action
CSM Happy Hollow Road - Dean Prohaska - Discussion and possible action
Action on reviewing zoning and subdivision codes

discussions.item: Zoning Change Request - Marathon County Highway Department
discussions.body: The Marathon County Highway Department was scheduled to present a request for rezoning approximately 25.24 acres from Business 3, Single Family, and Agricultural zones to M2 General Industrial at multiple addresses along Old Highway 51. The rezoning was set for public hearing and commission consideration, with specific parcel identification numbers and legal descriptions included in the agenda.

discussions.item: Conditional Use Permit - Zach & Abbigal Knetter Pond
discussions.body: Zach and Abbigal Knetter were scheduled to request a Conditional Use Permit for construction of a pond on the north side of their property on Kronenwetter Drive. The request was set for public hearing and commission review, covering approximately 15.47 acres with specific legal property descriptions.

discussions.item: CSM Happy Hollow Road - Dean Prohaska
discussions.body: The Commission was scheduled to review and discuss a Certified Survey Map (CSM) submission from Dean Prohaska related to Happy Hollow Road. Possible action was expected on this survey map request.
The Plan Commission was set to take action on reviewing the Village's zoning and subdivision codes. The agenda indicated this item was scheduled for discussion and possible action during the meeting.
The Commission was scheduled to address the Village's septic tank ordinance. This item was set for discussion and possible action as part of new business.

The Commission was scheduled to discuss and consider possible action on zoning or subdivision provisions related to twin homes and zero lot line development. Details regarding specific proposals were not provided in the agenda.

publicComment: Public comment was scheduled on the agenda, with a 15-minute total period for public remarks and a three-minute time limit per person, subject to extension at the presiding officer's discretion.
actionItems: Scheduled to vote on zoning change for Marathon County Highway Department property from B3, SF and AR to M2 General Industrial
Scheduled to consider conditional use permit for Knetter pond
Expected to take action on CSM for Marathon County Highway Facility
Expected to consider CSM for Happy Hollow Road - Dean Prohaska
Scheduled to take action on reviewing zoning and subdivision codes
Expected to address septic tank ordinance
Scheduled to discuss twin home and zero lot line provisions
title: REVISED Plan Commission Meeting - 2026-07-20
